meaning: 拉德诺郡[英国威尔士原郡名]
examples: Sunil, who had been living in Providence since 2008, grew up in Radnor, Pennsylvania.
Lincoln National ( LNC - news - people ), the financial services company based in Radnor, Pa.
Earlier this week it rejected plans for two wind farms at Pentre Tump, near New Radnor, and Mynydd-y-Cemmaes near Llanbrynmair.
